title: counter under clock cycle strange behavior
body:
Well here am I again. After many tries here trying to see some mistake by me, but I'm convinced me there is something strange on simulation.  
counter_neg is under negedge_clk and should change his value only in end of edge, but it change without arrive in end of negedge_clk. If do you think what I'm talking may be wrong i need notice you the flag is_control is in same edge clock and same always where  counter_neg in and works right while counter_neg not.

For this strange thing happen i just changed register on my transceiver from sequential to combinational "tx_dout_e and tx_sout_e". This should not cause any troubles to receiver but it do this. 

I'm happy to see what i was trying to explain but ..... i don't know what exactly could be. Here a VCD file and ScreenShot from from what showing the problem. If is possible to help i could be very glad.

The problem happen in new version from git hub and last month update.  

Happy new year people.  
 
[module_tb.vcd.zip](https://github.com/steveicarus/iverilog/files/1595264/module_tb.vcd.zip)

![captura de tela de 2017-12-31 13-00-15](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/11351022/34462458-cf0d4184-ee2b-11e7-9064-84d654b3794c.png)
